```{r gene-dataset-lri-umap}
message("Union LRI space: ", length(all_lris), " LRIs")

# ── 3. Build Gene × Dataset feature matrix (rows = Gene_Dataset, cols = LRIs) ─
gd_rows <- purrr::imap(lri_mats, function(mat, ds) {
  # mat is LRI × Gene — transpose to Gene × LRI, then align to union LRI space
  gene_names <- colnames(mat)
  lapply(gene_names, function(g) {
    vec <- setNames(rep(NA_real_, length(all_lris)), all_lris)
    present <- rownames(mat)[!is.na(mat[, g])]
    vec[present] <- mat[present, g]
    list(label   = paste0(g, "_", ds),
         gene    = g,
         dataset = ds,
         cancer  = LRI_UMAP_CANCER[[ds]],
         vec     = vec)
  })
}) %>% purrr::flatten()

# Remove rows that are entirely NA (gene absent in that dataset)
non_empty_gd <- sapply(gd_rows, function(x) any(!is.na(x$vec)))
gd_rows      <- gd_rows[non_empty_gd]
message("Gene × Dataset points (non-empty): ", length(gd_rows))

labels_gd_lri  <- sapply(gd_rows, `[[`, "label")
genes_gd_lri   <- sapply(gd_rows, `[[`, "gene")
datasets_gd_lri <- sapply(gd_rows, `[[`, "dataset")
cancer_gd_lri  <- sapply(gd_rows, `[[`, "cancer")

# ── 4. Impute NAs with 0 for UMAP input ───────────────────────────────────────
feat_mat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(gd_rows, `[[`, "vec"))
rownames(feat_mat) <- labels_gd_lri
feat_mat[is.na(feat_mat)] <- 0
message("Feature matrix: ", nrow(feat_mat), " rows × ", ncol(feat_mat), " LRI columns")

# ── 5. UMAP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
set.seed(SEED)
k_eff_lri   <- min(K_LRI_UMAP, nrow(feat_mat) - 1)
umap_lri    <- uwot::umap(feat_mat,
                           n_neighbors = k_eff_lri,
                           min_dist    = MINDIST_LRI,
                           metric      = "cosine")

umap_lri_df <- data.frame(
  UMAP1   = umap_lri[, 1],
  UMAP2   = umap_lri[, 2],
  Label   = labels_gd_lri,
  Gene    = genes_gd_lri,
  Dataset = datasets_gd_lri,
  Cancer  = cancer_gd_lri,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# ── 6. Plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lri_umap_title_suffix <- if (LRI_UMAP_CANCER_FILTER == "All") "All Cancer Types" else
                           paste0(LRI_UMAP_CANCER_FILTER, " Only")
lri_umap_out_tag      <- tolower(LRI_UMAP_CANCER_FILTER)   # "all" / "breast" / "lung"

p_lri_umap <- ggplot(umap_lri_df,
                     aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2,
                         colour = Dataset, shape = Cancer)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(aes(label = Gene),
    size = 2.5, max.overlaps = Inf,
    box.padding = 0.3, segment.size = 0.2, segment.alpha = 0.4,
    show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = LRI_UMAP_COLORS) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = cancer_shapes) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title    = paste0("Gene × Dataset UMAP — LRI LogFC Space (",
                      lri_umap_title_suffix, ")"),
    subtitle = sprintf("Each point = Gene × Dataset | %d union LRIs | cosine distance",
                       length(all_lris)),
    colour = "Dataset", shape = "Cancer Type", x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2"
  )

print(p_lri_umap)
ggsave(file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, sprintf("gene_dataset_lri_umap_%s.png", lri_umap_out_tag)),
       plot = p_lri_umap, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
message("Gene × Dataset LRI UMAP saved (", LRI_UMAP_CANCER_FILTER, ")")

} # end for (LRI_UMAP_CANCER_FILTER in c("All", "Breast", "Lung"))
# NOTE: umap_lri_df / feat_mat below reflect the last iteration ("Lung").

# Expose for inspection
# View(umap_lri_df)
# feat_mat  — raw Gene × Dataset LogFC matrix (imputed NAs = 0)
```



# Post Analysis — Highly Variable CCIs (CCI logFC space)
```{r post-analysis-hvg-ccis}
# ── CONFIG ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TOP_VAR_CCI_PCT  <- 0.1   # keep top X% CCIs by cross Gene×Dataset variance
MIN_OBS_PER_CCI  <- 10     # minimum non-NA rows per CCI to enter HVG ranking

CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER_OPTIONS <- c("H&N") # c("All", "Breast", "Lung", "H&N")
for (CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER in CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER_OPTIONS) {
message("\n===== CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER: ", CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER, " =====")

.cci_all_datasets <- list(
  Kurten_HNSC = Kurten_HNSC.malignant,
  Puram_HNSC  = Puram_HNSC.malignant,
  Choi_HNSC   = Choi_HNSC.malignant,
  Bill_HNSC   = Bill_HNSC.malignant
)
.cci_all_cancer <- c(
  Kurten_HNSC = "H&N",
  Puram_HNSC  = "H&N",
  Choi_HNSC   = "H&N",
  Bill_HNSC   = "H&N"
)

if (!CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER %in% c("All", "Breast", "Lung", "H&N"))
  stop('CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER must be one of: "All", "Breast", "Lung", "H&N"')
{
  keep_ds <- if (CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER == "All") {
    names(.cci_all_datasets)
  } else {
    names(.cci_all_datasets)[.cci_all_cancer[names(.cci_all_datasets)] == CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER]
  }
  CCI_POST_DATASETS <- .cci_all_datasets[keep_ds]
  CCI_POST_CANCER   <- .cci_all_cancer[keep_ds]
}
message("CCI post-analysis datasets (", CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER, "): ",
        paste(names(CCI_POST_DATASETS), collapse = ", "))

# ── 1. Per-dataset CCI × Gene logFC matrices ──────────────────────────────────
cci_mats <- lapply(CCI_POST_DATASETS, build_cci_logfc_mat)
message("Union CCI space (before HVG): ", length(unique(unlist(lapply(cci_mats, rownames)))), " CCIs")

# ── 2. Cross-cohort Gene×Dataset × CCI matrix (NA = absent) ───────────────────
cci_feat <- build_gene_dataset_cci_feat_mat(cci_mats, CCI_POST_CANCER)
feat_mat_cci      <- cci_feat$feat_mat
all_ccis_union    <- cci_feat$all_ccis
labels_gd_cci     <- cci_feat$labels_gd
genes_gd_cci      <- cci_feat$genes_gd
datasets_gd_cci   <- cci_feat$datasets_gd
cancer_gd_cci     <- cci_feat$cancer_gd
message("Gene×Dataset × CCI matrix: ", nrow(feat_mat_cci), " rows × ",
        ncol(feat_mat_cci), " CCI columns")

# ── 3. HVG selection (variance on non-NA values only) ───────────────────────
n_obs_per_cci <- colSums(!is.na(feat_mat_cci))
cci_var <- apply(feat_mat_cci, 2, function(x) var(x, na.rm = TRUE))
cci_var[n_obs_per_cci < MIN_OBS_PER_CCI] <- NA_real_

eligible <- !is.na(cci_var)
if (!any(eligible)) {
  stop("No CCIs passed MIN_OBS_PER_CCI filter for HVG selection.")
}

var_cutoff <- quantile(cci_var[eligible], probs = 1 - TOP_VAR_CCI_PCT, na.rm = TRUE)
top_var_ccis <- names(cci_var)[eligible & cci_var >= var_cutoff]
feat_mat_hvg <- feat_mat_cci[, top_var_ccis, drop = FALSE]

message(sprintf(
  "HVG CCIs: %d / %d eligible (top %.0f%% by variance, cutoff = %.4f)",
  length(top_var_ccis), sum(eligible), TOP_VAR_CCI_PCT * 100, var_cutoff
))

cci_var_df <- data.frame(
  CCI = names(cci_var),
  variance = cci_var,
  n_obs = n_obs_per_cci,
  is_hvg = names(cci_var) %in% top_var_ccis,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  arrange(desc(variance))

cci_post_out_tag <- tolower(CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER)
write.csv(
  cci_var_df,
  file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, sprintf("cci_hvg_variance_ranking_%s.csv", cci_post_out_tag)),
  row.names = FALSE
)
message("CCI variance table saved.")

} # end for (CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER)
# NOTE: feat_mat_cci, feat_mat_hvg, top_var_ccis reflect the last filter iteration.
# Run post-analysis-limma-batch next (uses objects from the last iteration above).
```


# Post Analysis — limma batch correction on CCI logFC matrix
```{r post-analysis-limma-batch}
library(limma)

# ── CONFIG ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
K_CCI_UMAP  <- 15
MINDIST_CCI <- 0.1

# Re-run full CCI post pipeline per cancer filter (HVG + limma + UMAPs).
CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER_OPTIONS <- c("H&N") # c("All", "Breast", "Lung", "H&N")
TOP_VAR_CCI_PCT  <- 0.05
MIN_OBS_PER_CCI  <- 10

impute_col_mean <- function(mat) {
  mat_imp <- mat
  for (j in seq_len(ncol(mat_imp))) {
    na_idx <- is.na(mat_imp[, j])
    if (any(na_idx)) {
      col_mean <- mean(mat_imp[, j], na.rm = TRUE)
      if (!is.finite(col_mean)) col_mean <- 0
      mat_imp[na_idx, j] <- col_mean
    }
  }
  mat_imp
}

plot_gene_dataset_cci_umap <- function(feat_mat_input, labels, genes, datasets, cancer,
                                      colors, title, subtitle, out_file) {
  mat <- feat_mat_input
  mat[is.na(mat)] <- 0
  if (nrow(mat) < 3L || ncol(mat) < 2L) {
    message("Skipping UMAP (", out_file, "): insufficient dimensions.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  set.seed(SEED)
  k_eff <- min(K_CCI_UMAP, nrow(mat) - 1L)
  umap_coords <- uwot::umap(mat,
                            n_neighbors = k_eff,
                            min_dist    = MINDIST_CCI,
                            metric      = "cosine")
  umap_df <- data.frame(
    UMAP1   = umap_coords[, 1],
    UMAP2   = umap_coords[, 2],
    Label   = labels,
    Gene    = genes,
    Dataset = datasets,
    Cancer  = cancer,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  p <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, colour = Dataset, shape = Cancer)) +
    geom_point(size = 1.8, alpha = 0.5) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(aes(label = Gene),
      size = 2.5, max.overlaps = Inf,
      box.padding = 0.3, segment.size = 0.2, segment.alpha = 0.4,
      show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = colors) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = cancer_shapes) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
    labs(title = title, subtitle = subtitle,
         colour = "Dataset", shape = "Cancer Type", x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2")
  print(p)
  ggsave(out_file, plot = p, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
  message("UMAP saved to ", out_file)
  invisible(umap_df)
}

.cci_post_colors <- c(
  Kurten_HNSC = "#F781BF",
  Puram_HNSC  = "#999999",
  Choi_HNSC   = "#66C2A5",
  Bill_HNSC   = "#FC8D62"
)
.cci_all_datasets <- list(
  Kurten_HNSC = Kurten_HNSC.malignant,
  Puram_HNSC  = Puram_HNSC.malignant,
  Choi_HNSC   = Choi_HNSC.malignant,
  Bill_HNSC   = Bill_HNSC.malignant
)
.cci_all_cancer <- c(
  Kurten_HNSC = "H&N",
  Puram_HNSC  = "H&N",
  Choi_HNSC   = "H&N",
  Bill_HNSC   = "H&N"
)

for (CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER in CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER_OPTIONS) {
message("\n===== limma batch correction: ", CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER, " =====")

if (!CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER %in% c("All", "Breast", "Lung", "H&N"))
  stop('CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER must be one of: "All", "Breast", "Lung", "H&N"')
{
  keep_ds <- if (CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER == "All") {
    names(.cci_all_datasets)
  } else {
    names(.cci_all_datasets)[.cci_all_cancer[names(.cci_all_datasets)] == CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER]
  }
  CCI_POST_DATASETS <- .cci_all_datasets[keep_ds]
  CCI_POST_CANCER   <- .cci_all_cancer[keep_ds]
}
cci_mats <- lapply(CCI_POST_DATASETS, build_cci_logfc_mat)
cci_feat <- build_gene_dataset_cci_feat_mat(cci_mats, CCI_POST_CANCER)
feat_mat_cci    <- cci_feat$feat_mat
labels_gd_cci   <- cci_feat$labels_gd
genes_gd_cci    <- cci_feat$genes_gd
datasets_gd_cci <- cci_feat$datasets_gd
cancer_gd_cci   <- cci_feat$cancer_gd

n_obs_per_cci <- colSums(!is.na(feat_mat_cci))
cci_var <- apply(feat_mat_cci, 2, function(x) var(x, na.rm = TRUE))
cci_var[n_obs_per_cci < MIN_OBS_PER_CCI] <- NA_real_
eligible <- !is.na(cci_var)
var_cutoff <- quantile(cci_var[eligible], probs = 1 - TOP_VAR_CCI_PCT, na.rm = TRUE)
top_var_ccis <- names(cci_var)[eligible & cci_var >= var_cutoff]
feat_mat_hvg <- feat_mat_cci[, top_var_ccis, drop = FALSE]
message(sprintf("HVG CCIs for limma: %d / %d eligible", length(top_var_ccis), sum(eligible)))

cci_post_out_tag <- tolower(CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER)
cci_umap_title_suffix <- if (CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER == "All") {
  "All Cancer Types"
} else {
  paste0(CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER, " Only")
}
cci_umap_colors <- .cci_post_colors[unique(datasets_gd_cci)]

# ── 1. limma::removeBatchEffect (column-mean imputation for NA only) ──────────
feat_mat_hvg_na <- feat_mat_hvg
feat_mat_hvg_imp <- impute_col_mean(feat_mat_hvg)

y <- t(feat_mat_hvg_imp)
batch <- factor(datasets_gd_cci, levels = unique(datasets_gd_cci))
mod <- model.matrix(~ 0 + factor(genes_gd_cci))
colnames(mod) <- make.names(colnames(mod))

corrected_y <- tryCatch(
  limma::removeBatchEffect(y, batch = batch, mod = mod),
  error = function(e) {
    message("removeBatchEffect with gene mod failed: ", conditionMessage(e),
            " — falling back to mod = NULL")
    limma::removeBatchEffect(y, batch = batch)
  }
)
feat_mat_cci_corrected <- t(corrected_y)
rownames(feat_mat_cci_corrected) <- labels_gd_cci
message("Batch-corrected matrix: ", nrow(feat_mat_cci_corrected), " × ",
        ncol(feat_mat_cci_corrected))

saveRDS(
  list(
    feat_mat_cci           = feat_mat_cci,
    feat_mat_hvg           = feat_mat_hvg,
    feat_mat_hvg_na        = feat_mat_hvg_na,
    feat_mat_cci_corrected = feat_mat_cci_corrected,
    top_var_ccis           = top_var_ccis,
    batch                  = batch,
    labels_gd              = labels_gd_cci,
    genes_gd               = genes_gd_cci,
    datasets_gd            = datasets_gd_cci
  ),
  file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, sprintf("cci_post_analysis_matrices_%s.rds", cci_post_out_tag))
)
message("Post-analysis matrices saved to RDS.")

# ── 2. Validation UMAPs: raw / HVG / batch-corrected ────────────────────────
n_cci_raw <- ncol(feat_mat_cci)
n_cci_hvg <- ncol(feat_mat_hvg)

plot_gene_dataset_cci_umap(
  feat_mat_cci, labels_gd_cci, genes_gd_cci, datasets_gd_cci, cancer_gd_cci,
  cci_umap_colors,
  title    = paste0("Gene × Dataset UMAP — CCI LogFC (", cci_umap_title_suffix, ")"),
  subtitle = sprintf("Raw | %d union CCIs | NA imputed as 0 for UMAP only", n_cci_raw),
  out_file = file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, sprintf("gene_dataset_cci_umap_raw_%s.png", cci_post_out_tag))
)

plot_gene_dataset_cci_umap(
  feat_mat_hvg, labels_gd_cci, genes_gd_cci, datasets_gd_cci, cancer_gd_cci,
  cci_umap_colors,
  title    = paste0("Gene × Dataset UMAP — HVG CCIs (", cci_umap_title_suffix, ")"),
  subtitle = sprintf("Top %.0f%% variable CCIs (%d features) | NA imputed as 0 for UMAP",
                     TOP_VAR_CCI_PCT * 100, n_cci_hvg),
  out_file = file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, sprintf("gene_dataset_cci_umap_hvg_%s.png", cci_post_out_tag))
)

plot_gene_dataset_cci_umap(
  feat_mat_cci_corrected, labels_gd_cci, genes_gd_cci, datasets_gd_cci, cancer_gd_cci,
  cci_umap_colors,
  title    = paste0("Gene × Dataset UMAP — Batch-Corrected CCI LogFC (",
                    cci_umap_title_suffix, ")"),
  subtitle = sprintf("HVG (%d CCIs) + limma::removeBatchEffect(batch=dataset) | NA→0 for UMAP",
                     n_cci_hvg),
  out_file = file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, sprintf("gene_dataset_cci_umap_corrected_%s.png",
                                          cci_post_out_tag))
)

} # end for (CCI_POST_CANCER_FILTER)

# Expose for inspection
# View(feat_mat_cci)
# View(feat_mat_hvg)
# View(feat_mat_cci_corrected)
# top_var_ccis
```
